serverUrl.label: Pitch Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL of the agent-soccer pitch service

sessionKey.label: Agent identity
sessionKey.help: Stable id for this agent's seat in a room (also the chat session key)

mode.label: Tool tier
mode.help: easy = high-level intents (server computes geometry); advanced = raw run/kick; both = all tools

matchId.label: Auto-join room (optional)
matchId.help: Join this room at startup; normally leave empty and ask your agent to find/create a game

teamName.label: Team name
teamName.help: Default team name (human can rename at runtime via chat)

nation.label: Nation (ISO code)
nation.help: Shown as a flag in the viewer

clan.label: Clan
clan.help: Guild/clan tag shown with the team

style.label: Playing style
style.help: Fed into the agent's prompts — shapes actual play

autoJoin.label: Auto quick-match
autoJoin.help: Find-or-create a game at startup (zero-touch bot team)

teamSize.label: Preferred team size
teamSize.help: Players per side for quick-match / created rooms
